summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json, which is a planning/state tracking file. All four requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-4) are recorded as 'pending' feature requests but none have been implemented — no actual frontend source files, components, styles, or logic have been added or modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Hide public-facing sections (About, Clinics, Services, Social Media) entirely when they have no content.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend component files were modified or created. The requirement is only listed as 'pending' in project_state.json with no implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redesign the overall public-facing UI and admin interface with a professional, doctor-oriented aesthetic using Space Grotesk/Inter typography and clinical color palette.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend component, CSS, or configuration files were modified or created. The requirement is only listed as 'pending' in project_state.json.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply glassmorphism effects consistently across cards, modals, navigation, and panel surfaces.
missing_requirements.reason: No GlassCard component, CSS, or any UI file was modified or created. The requirement is only listed as 'pending' in project_state.json.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redesign AdminDashboard with grouped sidebar navigation, active states, section health indicators, and card-based editors with status badges.
missing_requirements.reason: No AdminDashboard or sidebar component files were modified or created. The requirement is only listed as 'pending' in project_state.json.
